title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
